'''Zorneth''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] that made and named the [[savorium herb]]. At one point, the botanist owned [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]].

{{Char-stub}}
